channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Broos confident Lyle Foster can regain form ahead of World Cup after missed penalty
item.description: Bafana Bafana coach Hugo Broos has expressed strong confidence that striker Lyle Foster will recover his form and confidence in time for the FIFA World Cup 2026. Foster, who recently returned to the s...

item.title: Elbląg Canal: Poland’s Unique Boat-on-Rail Waterway System
item.description: The Elbląg Canal in northern Poland is one of Europe’s most remarkable hydraulic engineering achievements, stretching over 80 kilometers between the Jeziorak and Druzno lakes. Built during the 19th ce...

item.title: Burke Toews appointed as new head coach of Gilas Pilipinas Women, ushering in a new era
item.description: The Samahang Basketbol ng Pilipinas (SBP) has officially named Canadian coach Burke Toews as the new head coach of the Gilas Pilipinas Women’s national basketball team, marking the start of a new chap...

item.title: US judge halts parts of Trump-led Kennedy Centre overhaul and orders removal of his name
item.description: A federal judge in Washington has issued a ruling that temporarily blocks key aspects of President Donald Trump’s planned overhaul of the John F. Kennedy Centre for the Performing Arts, marking a sign...

item.title: Investigation advances into murder of elderly couple in Kruger National Park as suspects are pursued across borders
item.description: South African and regional authorities are reportedly making significant progress in the investigation into the brutal killing of an elderly couple in the Kruger National Park earlier in May 2026. The...

item.title: Philippine and US Forces Conduct Joint Maritime Drills to Strengthen Defense Cooperation
item.description: The Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) and the Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) partnered with the United States Indo-Pacific Command (USINDOPACOM) in a bilateral Maritime Cooperative Activity (MCA) ne...

item.title: Search continues for two missing villagers after Laos flooded cave rescue
item.description: Rescue operations at a flooded cave system in Laos have shifted focus to locating two missing villagers after five other trapped men were successfully freed. The two missing individuals, Bay, a teenag...

item.title: Prime accused in Sulur child sexual assault and murder case injured after prison attack in Coimbatore
item.description: The prime accused in the shocking sexual assault and murder case of a 10-year-old girl near Sulur in Coimbatore has been attacked inside prison, resulting in grievous injuries. The accused, identified...

item.title: Loftus Versfeld suite holders dispute rising hospitality fees ahead of major rugby fixtures
item.description: Luxury suite leaseholders at Loftus Versfeld Stadium have raised serious concerns over a new pricing structure introduced ahead of high-profile rugby matches, including the Vodacom Bulls clash against...

item.title: Jigawa Hajj pilgrims to return home June 6 after successful completion of pilgrimage
item.description: The Ameerul Hajj for Jigawa State and Emir of Dutse, Alhaji Muhammad Hameem Nuhu Sunusi, has confirmed that all pilgrims from Jigawa State participating in the 2026 Hajj exercise are expected to retur...

item.title: Defence investment aims to drive jobs, housing and regeneration in Plymouth
item.description: Plymouth, long associated with Britain’s naval history, is seeking to revitalise its economy through renewed government investment in defence. The city, home to Devonport dockyard—the largest naval ba...

item.title: The development of Phoenix from sugar estate to a major Durban settlement and its historic private bus network
item.description: This opinion piece explores the historical development of Phoenix, a township in Durban, South Africa, tracing its origins from a sugar cane estate to a fully developed residential settlement with a d...

item.title: Philippines and United States reaffirm defense ties on 75th MDT anniversary amid Indo-Pacific tensions
item.description: The Philippines and the United States reaffirmed their long-standing alliance as they marked the 75th anniversary of their Mutual Defense Treaty (MDT), highlighting its continued relevance amid rising...

item.title: China carries out patrols near Scarborough Shoal amid Philippine security concerns
item.description: China's military and coast guard conducted patrols near Scarborough Shoal in the South China Sea on May 31, 2026, following a warning from the Philippines about ongoing security threats. Scarborough S...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee seen in heated exchange with Kolkata hospital officials during treatment of Abhishek Banerjee
item.description: A video clip purportedly showing West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee engaging in a heated conversation with officials at Kolkata’s Belle Vue Hospital has gone viral on social media, triggering ...

item.title: Lily Collins films romantic beach scene in Mykonos for final season of Emily in Paris
item.description: Lily Collins has been spotted filming scenes for the final season of the Netflix series Emily in Paris, with production taking place on the Greek island of Mykonos. The new series shifts away from its...

item.title: Land Rover Defender reviewed as a versatile luxury off-road SUV symbolising freedom
item.description: In this motoring feature, Eyaaz Matwadia reflects on his experience with the Land Rover Defender 110 X-Dynamic HSE, framing it as a vehicle that represents ‘freedom on wheels’. The article was written...

item.title: Skof, Manchester review: a Michelin-starred tasting menu that shows fine dining can be magical
item.description: Skof, a 36-seat Michelin-starred restaurant in Manchester’s M4 area, is presented as a compelling example of modern fine dining that balances technical precision with emotional storytelling. Opened in...

item.title: Arsenal clinches 2025/2026 Premier League title with standout season and Saka’s rise
item.description: This article talks about Arsenal Football Club’s memorable triumph in the 2025/2026 Premier League season, where they finally lifted the league trophy after years of near misses. The victory, official...

item.title: PSG to receive replica Champions League trophy under UEFA rules after win over Arsenal
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain have successfully defended their UEFA Champions League title after edging Arsenal in a tense final decided on penalties at the Puskas Arena in Budapest, Hungary. The match was tigh...
